creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
building 'popplerqt5' extension
/usr/local/bin/sip-3.5 -I /usr/local/share/PyQtsip/3.5/sip -t POPPLER_V0_28_0 -c build/temp.freebsd-13.0-CURRENT-amd64-3.5 -b build/temp.freebsd-13.0-CURRENT-amd64-3.5/poppler-qt5.sbf -I /usr/local/share/PyQt5/3.5/sip -n PyQt5.sip -t WS_X11 -t Qt_5_12_0 poppler-qt5.sip
sip: Deprecation warning: poppler-qt5.sip:1: %Module version numbers are deprecated and ignored
sip: QDomElement is undefined
error: command '/usr/local/bin/sip-3.5' failed with exit status 1
*** Error code 1


This fails to build.

There is an upstream issue to this, and a fork that just disables QtXml... 

The real upstream had the last release on Feb 27, 2015. Do we really need this dead fish :) -- if so, you need to apply the fix or switch to the fork that includes it.



mfg Tobias
